case_title: KHOURY, SAMI vs. RUBINSTEIN, MICHAEL STEVEN et al

docket_entries.description: TRIAL ASSIGNED TO DEPARTMENT 06

JUDGE D BALLATI; RPTR S LEE; CLK C CARSWELL CASE CALLED FOR COURT TRIAL. PLTF KHOURY PRESENT WITH ATNY GEORGE CARR. DEFT RUBINSTEIN PRESENT WITH ATNY JONATHAN LEVITAN. ORAL & DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE PRESENTED BY BOTH SIDES. BOTH SIDES MADE CLOSING ARGUMENT AND SUBMITTED. THE COURT ISSUED A RULING FROM THE BENCH AND ORDERED A CONDITIONAL JUDGMENT.PLTF ENTITLED TO BACK RENT, DAMAGES, ATNY FEES PER SCHEDULE & COSTS. IF DEFT PAYS, THEN DEFT MAY RETAIN POSSESSON OF THE PREMISES. EXHIBITS RETAINED EXCEPT FOR DEFT'S D-1 WHICH IS RETURNED TO DEFT. PLTF ATNY TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RUBINSTEIN, MICHAEL STEVEN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1884 MARKET STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA $14,205.00 RENT, $1,725.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $16,030.00, LEASE FORFEITED
